data.body: STACK LANDED: submitted top 521 -> all 4 (515 517 518 521) MERGED in one FF op. Closed 7a41(#9), d220(#6), 5147(#3, all 3 parts). 9/10 BUGS + skill CLOSED (#5 #4 #7 #10 #2 #1 #9 #6 #3). 406f(#8): code merged but verifier wants a plan-review PIPELINE test (finder->verifier, no absence-BLOCK on third-party symbol) -> #8 subagent building it in fix-406f-pipeline-test worktree. 3b4e: delete+init index.lock tests written+mutation-proven (revert->RED), pushed Gerrit 524. Remaining to close: 406f (pipeline test), 3b4e (524 merge). c593 (certbot sibling) left open as future discovered-work.
